MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition and Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
